name: openxrtoolkit
description: Note about OpenXR Toolkit being deprecated

blocks.text:
Support will not be provided for use of the tool in any support channels

Nothing in the tool has been changed in over a year and the developer recommends if you experience new issues with it you follow the official troubleshooting and [reset your settings](https://mbucchia.github.io/OpenXR-Toolkit/troubleshooting.html#reset-all-the-settings)
